CASUE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PL. PRESENT W/RON ARLAS AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - RESETITUTION OF PREMISES AT 135-B MAGNOLIA LANE, S.F, CA. - ALL BACK RENT & DAMAGES WVD. - SECURITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED & ANY ACCOUNTING OF DE- POSIT WVD. BY DEF. - PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION - DEF. CERTIFIES HE IS THE SOLE ADULT OCCUPANT - ANY PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES WILL BE DEEMED ABANDONED - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATETLY. BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 10-20-93 & DEF. AGREES TO VACATE BY 10-19-93 - UPON VACATING PREMISES THE PL. AGREES TO VACATE JUDGMENT & DISM THE ACTION. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEREMIAS, DEANNA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 135-B MAGNOLIA LANE, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL OCT-19-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, DEF. FORFEITS SEC. DEP. & ANY ACCOUNTING OF DEPOSIT. NO FURTHER STAYS IN CONSIDERATION FOR WAIVING ALL BACK RENTS & DAMAAGES. DEF. SOLE ADULT OCCUPANT. SEE FILE FOR DETAILS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LATORA, SAL AS TO DEFENDANT JEREMIAS, DEANNA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
